ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balances context and persona but lacks some naturalness in tone, which could be improved for better flow with the player's request.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: Lacks both relevance and consistency as it does not engage with the dynamic context or align with merchant persona, also seems too rigid.
